name: Facial Expressions
pose: Identical body pose and framing across all panels, matching the reference.
variable_block: Only the facial expression. Controlled, readable changes in expression from panel to panel.

locked.single_ref: Same face, facial proportions, hairstyle, skin tone, visible outfit, camera distance, camera height, framing, and lighting in all panels, matching the reference image.
locked.dual_or_triple_ref: Same face, facial proportions, hairstyle, skin tone, visible outfit, camera distance, camera height, framing, and lighting in all panels.

forbidden_entries: No age shift, no beautification drift.
No distortion, no exaggerated cartoon distortion.
